patch.value: SDK authoring-time define* typed builders for every extension registration surface

Complete the SDK authoring ergonomics tripod (author -> register -> test). The SDK already exposes defineExtension (module identity), assert* helpers (verify a registration), and run* helpers (invoke a registration), but there is NO authoring-time typed builder for the individual registration definitions package authors hand to api.register*. Add a complete, symmetric set of zero-cost define* identity builders mirroring defineExtension and the ecosystem defineConfig/defineComponent convention. Object-definition builders (defineCommand, defineFlag, defineItemType, defineItemField, defineMigration, defineSearchProvider, defineVectorStoreAdapter) and function-definition builders (defineCommandOverride, defineParserOverride, definePreflightOverride, defineServiceOverride, defineRendererOverride, defineImporter, defineExporter, defineBeforeCommandHook, defineAfterCommandHook, defineOnWriteHook, defineOnReadHook, defineOnIndexHook). Value: in plain-JavaScript packages (the documented norm; package init scaffolds .js) authors cannot write TS type annotations, so a bare `const cmd = {...}` gets zero checking; `const cmd = defineCommand({...})` gives full type-checking + contextual handler-parameter inference via the helper signature, and lets definitions be colocated, exported, reused, and unit-tested apart from activate(). New src/sdk/define.ts, re-exported from the SDK barrel, 100% line + docstring coverage, documented in docs/SDK.md.

Added src/sdk/define.ts with 19 zero-cost identity builders covering every ExtensionApi registration surface: object-def builders defineCommand/defineFlag/defineItemType/defineItemField/defineMigration/defineSearchProvider/defineVectorStoreAdapter (generic <T extends Def>(x:T):T, preserve literals + infer nested handlers) and function-def builders defineCommandOverride/defineParserOverride/definePreflightOverride/defineServiceOverride/defineRendererOverride/defineImporter/defineExporter/defineBeforeCommandHook/defineAfterCommandHook/defineOnWriteHook/defineOnReadHook/defineOnIndexHook (non-generic (fn:Fn):Fn so a bare .js arrow's param is contextually typed). Re-exported via SDK barrel (export * from ./define.js); barrel identity locked in tests/unit/sdk/sdk-define.spec.ts. Documented in docs/SDK.md (new Authoring Builders section + Public Exports list). Rationale recorded in ADR pm-3mph.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: define* builder signature rule (verified by tsc): OBJECT-definition builders use generic <T extends Def>(x:T):T — preserves narrow literal types AND still infers nested handler params (defineCommand's run context inferred). FUNCTION-definition builders MUST be non-generic (fn:Fn):Fn — a generic constrained to a whole function type suppresses contextual typing so a bare .js arrow's param silently becomes implicit any. All builders are pure zero-cost identity (return arg unchanged), matching defineExtension + ecosystem defineConfig; validation deliberately stays in register*/loader + assert* (one source of truth). Manual-test gotcha (same as memory): inline command-definition flags require the 'schema' capability in the manifest, else activation.failed records registerCommand metadata invalid — define* output is correct, the capability gate is unchanged.

patch.value: Delivered src/sdk/define.ts: 19 zero-cost identity define* builders for every ExtensionApi registration surface (object-def generic + function-def non-generic), re-exported via the SDK barrel with barrel-identity locked in tests/unit/sdk/sdk-define.spec.ts, documented in docs/SDK.md. Completes the author->register->test ergonomics tripod. 100% line+branch coverage (4843 tests), tsc+packages clean, build clean. Verified end-to-end in a temp dir: a real package authored entirely with define* from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk activates, registers, and runs through @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk/testing. ADR rationale in pm-3mph (kept open as living record). Part of epic pm-ugqx.

Package authors author command/flag/type/field/migration/search/vector/override/importer/exporter/hook definitions via define* with full type-checking + contextual handler-param inference (incl. plain .js packages) before api.register*; the SDK builds, typechecks (src + tsconfig.packages.json), and ships the builders on the @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk subpath at 100% coverage.

tsc (src+packages) clean; build clean; 100% line+branch coverage (29399 lines, 23831 branches; 4843 tests). Manual temp-dir verification: a real package authored entirely with define* from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk activated via sdk/testing, registered its search provider, and ran 'greet hello alice --loud' returning {greeting:'hi alice',loud:true}. dist/sdk/define.d.ts declares all 19 builders; index.d.ts re-exports them for JS IntelliSense.
